title: - Days 4–6:
content:
- Days 4–6:
- Focus blocks: 20–30 questions per day on each of your weakest topics (for example, agency vs. fair housing vs. math).
- Keep listening to short audio segments on the same weak areas while driving or walking.
- End‑of‑week target:
- Reach 80–85% or better on at least one full practice exam.

***

## Week 4 – Final polish and state‑exam readiness

Goal: Solidify state‑specific content and build confidence.

- Days 1–3:
- Take at least two more full timed practice exams, trying to simulate test conditions (no notes, minimal breaks).
- After each exam, categorize misses: content you forgot vs. careless mistakes vs. misreading questions.
- Days 4–5:
- Light content review of NY license law, fair housing, disclosures, and key definitions from the NY text; these are frequent test points.[12][15][13][14]
context: From document: Since she has prior experience and is coming back after a lapse, this… — chunk 4 (chunk 4/8)
